reasons.cause: The manifest failed validation or bound an undefined policy.
The request named an intervention point the manifest does not configure.
A required path did not resolve.
A path segment met an incompatible JSON type.
The projected tool name is absent from the catalog.
The dispatcher output could not be normalized.
An effect was malformed or did not apply to its target.
Evaluation or manifest loading exceeded a configured resource limit.
An approved action identity did not match the current action identity.
An SDK approval resolver raised, returned an unrecognized result, or otherwise failed closed.
An SDK streaming helper could not assemble a complete response snapshot for evaluation and failed closed.
An SDK adapter detected an unmediated framework method or unsupported call shape and failed closed instead of invoking upstream code.
A JSON wire binding received a malformed intervention request envelope and failed closed before policy input construction.
